title: Troubleshooting, Security, Recovery, and Operations Handoff · Terminal Trace: Least Privilege Sudo
summary: Resolve a multi-layer workstation incident and hand off a safe, reproducible operating procedure to another technician. Planned artifact: Add and verify the linux least privilege sudo increment in a complete Linux operations evidence portfolio. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use privilege only for the smallest justified operation while preserving command provenance, environment boundaries, and audit evidence.
Form competing hypotheses, select discriminating observations, and update confidence without changing multiple layers at once.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# linux-basics cumulative operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic stateful terminal simulator.
# Record hypothesis, command, expected signal, observation, conclusion, and recovery.
